languages.text: "Это морок, Домин'{name}". {n}Кибелла с силой царапает свое предплечье длинным ногтем, оставляя на коже кровавую борозду.{/n} "Не доверяй своим глазам, не верь своим ушам. Лишь воля и вера в {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Неумирающего{/g} позволят тебе отличить то, что истинно, от лукавства Врагов Человечества".

traits.locale_text: "Это морок, Домин'{name}". {n}Кибелла с силой царапает свое предплечье длинным ногтем, оставляя на коже кровавую борозду.{/n} "Не доверяй своим глазам, не верь своим ушам. Лишь воля и вера в {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Неумирающего{/g} позволят тебе отличить то, что истинно, от лукавства Врагов Человечества".
traits.speaker: KibellahCompanion

languages.text: "It is a mirage, Domin'{name}." {n}Kibellah digs a long fingernail into her forearm, leaving a bloody furrow in its wake.{/n} "Do not trust your eyes, do not heed your ears. Only will and faith in the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g} will help you to distinguish what is true from the trickery of the enemies of Humanity."
languages.original_text: "Это морок, Домин'{name}". {n}Кибелла с силой царапает свое предплечье длинным ногтем, оставляя на коже кровавую борозду.{/n} "Не доверяй своим глазам, не верь своим ушам. Лишь воля и вера в {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Неумирающего{/g} позволят тебе отличить то, что истинно, от лукавства Врагов Человечества".

traits.locale_text: "It is a mirage, Domin'{name}." {n}Kibellah digs a long fingernail into her forearm, leaving a bloody furrow in its wake.{/n} "Do not trust your eyes, do not heed your ears. Only will and faith in the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g} will help you to distinguish what is true from the trickery of the enemies of Humanity."

Only will and faith in the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g} will help you to distinguish what is true from the trickery of the enemies of Humanity."

"It is a mirage, Domin'{name}." {n}Kibellah digs a long fingernail into her forearm, leaving a bloody furrow in its wake.{/n} "Do not trust your eyes, do not heed your ears. Only will and faith in the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g} will help you to distinguish what is true from the trickery of the enemies of Humanity."

languages.text: “这是幻象，{name}秘者。”{n}绮贝菈用长长的指甲在自己的前臂上狠狠划出一道血痕。{/n}“不要相信你的眼睛，不要听从你的耳朵。唯有意志，还有对{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}不死之神{/g}的信仰，方能助你分辨真实与人类之敌的诡计。”
languages.original_text: "It is a mirage, Domin'{name}." {n}Kibellah digs a long fingernail into her forearm, leaving a bloody furrow in its wake.{/n} "Do not trust your eyes, do not heed your ears. Only will and faith in the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g} will help you to distinguish what is true from the trickery of the enemies of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: “这是幻象，{name}秘者。”{n}绮贝菈用长长的指甲在自己的前臂上狠狠划出一道血痕。{/n}“不要相信你的眼睛，不要听从你的耳朵。唯有意志，还有对{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}不死之神{/g}的信仰，方能助你分辨真实与人类之敌的诡计。”

languages.text: « Ce n'est rien qu'un mirage, Domin {name}. » {n}Kibellah plante un ongle acéré dans son avant-bras, laissant dans sa chair un sillon sanguinolent.{/n} « Ne croyez pas ce que vous disent vos yeux et vos oreilles. Seules la volonté et la foi en l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Immortel{/g} vous aideront à distinguer la vérité des mensonges des ennemis de l'humanité. »
languages.original_text: "It is a mirage, Domin'{name}." {n}Kibellah digs a long fingernail into her forearm, leaving a bloody furrow in its wake.{/n} "Do not trust your eyes, do not heed your ears. Only will and faith in the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g} will help you to distinguish what is true from the trickery of the enemies of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: « Ce n'est rien qu'un mirage, Domin {name}. » {n}Kibellah plante un ongle acéré dans son avant-bras, laissant dans sa chair un sillon sanguinolent.{/n} « Ne croyez pas ce que vous disent vos yeux et vos oreilles. Seules la volonté et la foi en l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Immortel{/g} vous aideront à distinguer la vérité des mensonges des ennemis de l'humanité. »

languages.text: "Bu bir serap Domin'{name}." {n}Kibellah, uzun tırnağını ön koluna batırarak kanlı bir oluk açıyor.{/n} "Gözlere güven olmaz, kulaklara aldırış edilmez. Yalnızca irade ve {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Ölmeyen'e{/g} duyulan inanç, gerçeği İnsanlığa düşman olanların hilelerinden ayırmanızı sağlayacaktır."
languages.original_text: "It is a mirage, Domin'{name}." {n}Kibellah digs a long fingernail into her forearm, leaving a bloody furrow in its wake.{/n} "Do not trust your eyes, do not heed your ears. Only will and faith in the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g} will help you to distinguish what is true from the trickery of the enemies of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: "Bu bir serap Domin'{name}." {n}Kibellah, uzun tırnağını ön koluna batırarak kanlı bir oluk açıyor.{/n} "Gözlere güven olmaz, kulaklara aldırış edilmez. Yalnızca irade ve {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Ölmeyen'e{/g} duyulan inanç, gerçeği İnsanlığa düşman olanların hilelerinden ayırmanızı sağlayacaktır."

languages.text: «Es un espejismo, Domin'{name}». {n}Kibellah clava una larga uña en su antebrazo, dejando una marca sangrienta a su paso.{/n} «No confíe en sus ojos ni haga caso a sus oídos. Solo la fuerza de voluntad y la fe en el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Inmortal{/g} le ayudarán a distinguir lo que es real de las artimañas de los enemigos de la Humanidad».
languages.original_text: "It is a mirage, Domin'{name}." {n}Kibellah digs a long fingernail into her forearm, leaving a bloody furrow in its wake.{/n} "Do not trust your eyes, do not heed your ears. Only will and faith in the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g} will help you to distinguish what is true from the trickery of the enemies of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: «Es un espejismo, Domin'{name}». {n}Kibellah clava una larga uña en su antebrazo, dejando una marca sangrienta a su paso.{/n} «No confíe en sus ojos ni haga caso a sus oídos. Solo la fuerza de voluntad y la fe en el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Inmortal{/g} le ayudarán a distinguir lo que es real de las artimañas de los enemigos de la Humanidad».

languages.text: "Das ist ein Wunder, Domin'{name}." {n}Kibellah bohrt einen langen Fingernagel in ihren Unterarm und hinterlässt eine blutende Furche.{/n} "Traut weder Euren Augen, noch Euren Ohren. Allein Euer Wille und der Glaube an den {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Todlosen{/g} wird Euch helfen, die wahre Gestalt der Hexerei der Feinde der Menschheit zu erkennen."
languages.original_text: "It is a mirage, Domin'{name}." {n}Kibellah digs a long fingernail into her forearm, leaving a bloody furrow in its wake.{/n} "Do not trust your eyes, do not heed your ears. Only will and faith in the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g} will help you to distinguish what is true from the trickery of the enemies of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist ein Wunder, Domin'{name}." {n}Kibellah bohrt einen langen Fingernagel in ihren Unterarm und hinterlässt eine blutende Furche.{/n} "Traut weder Euren Augen, noch Euren Ohren. Allein Euer Wille und der Glaube an den {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Todlosen{/g} wird Euch helfen, die wahre Gestalt der Hexerei der Feinde der Menschheit zu erkennen."

languages.text: 「それは蜃気楼よ、ドミニック・{name}。」{n}キベルラは長い爪を前腕に深く突き刺し、血の跡を残す。{/n}「目と耳を信じないで。真実を見分けるのは、意志と{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}人類の敵{/g}に対する信仰のみだ。」
languages.original_text: "It is a mirage, Domin'{name}." {n}Kibellah digs a long fingernail into her forearm, leaving a bloody furrow in its wake.{/n} "Do not trust your eyes, do not heed your ears. Only will and faith in the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g} will help you to distinguish what is true from the trickery of the enemies of Humanity."
